meta.title: Rail Gun - Secure Private Messaging
meta.description: Rail Gun is civic infrastructure for private communication. End-to-end encrypted messaging where your keys never leave your device.
meta.keywords: encrypted messaging, secure chat, Signal protocol, end-to-end encryption, private messaging

hero.subheadline: Rail Gun is civic infrastructure for private communication. End-to-end encrypted messaging where your keys never leave your device. Truth without permission.

features.title: Why Rail Gun?
features.subtitle: Built from the ground up with privacy and security as the foundation, not an afterthought.

signal.title: Signal Protocol
signal.description: Double Ratchet (KDF chains) + X3DH key exchange. Industry-standard end-to-end encryption with libsignal

curve.title: Curve25519 Encryption
curve.description: Modern elliptic curve cryptography (Curve25519) for key exchange and signatures via NaCl

chacha.title: ChaCha20-Poly1305
chacha.description: AEAD cipher providing authenticated encryption with associated data (AEAD) for message confidentiality

group.title: Group Encryption
group.description: Communities with encrypted channels using Signal Protocol group sessions and per-recipient keys

pfs.title: Perfect Forward Secrecy
pfs.description: Each message uses ephemeral keys. Compromised long-term keys cannot decrypt past messages

opensource.title: Open Source & Auditable
opensource.description: Full transparency on GitHub. Cryptographic implementations reviewed and auditable by security experts

blind.title: Server Blindness
blind.description: Backend sees only encrypted blobs (ChaCha20-Poly1305) and routing metadata. Content never exposed

desktop.title: Desktop-First Client
desktop.description: Native Electron app for macOS, Windows, Linux with local key storage and OS-level encryption

waitlist.title: Join the Private Beta
waitlist.subtitle: Rail Gun is currently invitation-only. Join the waitlist to get early access when we expand.
waitlist.success: You're on the list! We'll be in touch soon.
waitlist.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
waitlist.privacy: We respect your privacy. No spam, ever.

security.title: Your messages are truly private
security.subtitle: Rail Gun uses the same encryption protocol trusted by billions of users worldwide. Your private keys are generated locally and never touch our servers.
features: Local key generation and storage (never transmitted)

verify.title: Verify Your Download
verify.description: Always verify downloads to ensure they haven't been tampered with.

platforms.title: Available Everywhere
platforms.subtitle: Download Rail Gun for your platform or use the web version.

cta.title: Ready to take back your privacy?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust Rail Gun for secure communication.

footer.description: End-to-end encrypted with Signal Protocol (X3DH + Double Ratchet), Curve25519, and ChaCha20-Poly1305. Your keys, your privacy.

charter.title: The Rail Gun Charter
charter.subtitle: Rail Gun is civic infrastructure. It exists to lower the cost of truth, protect communication without permission, and enable peaceful coordination at scale.

preamble.title: Preamble
preamble.p1: Rail Gun is not a weapon. It is a road, a printing press, a public utility for the information age. We build infrastructure that makes violence unnecessary by making truth accessible, lies expensive, and peaceful self-correction possible.
preamble.p2: We succeed when a journalist can publish evidence without fear, when families can communicate across hostile borders, when communities can organize mutual aid without surveillance, and when societies can correct themselves without bloodshed.

charter.principlesSubtitle: These principles are non-negotiable. Every product decision, every feature, every communication must align with them.

1.title: Non-Violence Is Non-Negotiable
1.description: Rail Gun never advocates, facilitates, or enables violence, coercion, or physical harm. We design to reduce the conditions that lead to violence by making peaceful alternatives viable.

2.title: Infrastructure, Not Agitation
2.description: We build roads, not barricades. Printing presses, not weapons. Our purpose is to provide neutral, durable infrastructure that any community can use for lawful purposes.

3.title: Truth Without Permission
3.description: Every person has the right to communicate, to publish evidence, and to coordinate with others—without requiring approval from any central authority.

4.title: Sovereignty At The Edge
4.description: Users control their own keys, their own data, and their own relationships. Rail Gun operators cannot read messages or identify users beyond minimal routing metadata.

5.title: The Protocol Survives The Operator
5.description: The core protocol must remain functional even if Rail Gun is compromised, acquired, or shut down. No single point of failure. No kill switch.

6.title: Layered Separation Protects Legitimacy
6.description: The Sovereign Core (protocol) is neutral. The Services Layer (enterprise, compliance) is where business happens. These layers are architecturally separate.

7.title: Safe Defaults, Deliberate Power
7.description: Default settings are safe and appropriate for ordinary communication. Features with elevated risk require explicit user intent and informed consent.

8.title: Minimal Retention, Maximum Deletion
8.description: We retain the minimum data necessary for routing and never longer than required. Users can delete their data completely.

9.title: Legitimacy Through Transparency
9.description: Rail Gun publishes its protocols, audits its code, discloses its funding, and operates in the open. Legitimacy is earned through accountability.

10.title: No Enemies, Only Problems
10.description: We do not personalize adversaries or name targets. We describe problems and build solutions. The goal is a world where everyone can communicate safely.

whatWeAreNot.title: What Rail Gun Is Not
items: Not a tool for harassment, doxxing, or stalking
Not a platform for coordinating illegal violence
Not a weapon against any person, institution, or government
Not a promise of immunity from consequences

audit.title: Annual Ethics Audit
audit.description: Independent review of product decisions against this Charter.

transparency.title: Transparency Reports
transparency.description: Quarterly disclosure of government requests and compliance actions.

marketing.title: No Deceptive Marketing
marketing.description: All claims about security and privacy must be technically verifiable.

governance.title: Community Governance
governance.description: Protocol changes require open deliberation and rough consensus.

charter.closing: This Charter is a living document. Amendments require public deliberation, community consent, and alignment with the principle of non-violence.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: Sorry, we couldn't find the page you're looking for.
